visual_rule: Fighting attacks should read as a heavy body-blow impact: a bone-white hit flash, a terracotta-red core, sandy dust fracture, and angular strike shards. Keep the subject compact, grounded, and readable in battle.

variants.description: Shared compact body-blow impact package for fighting attacks.

assets.notes: Primary hit subject and the clearest read in the set.
Tight pre-hit punch knot with a hard-edged flash.
Angular grit, dust fracture, and short debris accents.
Low-alpha dust cleanup layer for the aftermath frame.

usage_notes: Use the impact bloom as the dominant subject.
Keep travel disabled for the shared fallback.
Prefer compact anchors and grounded compositing.
Avoid beams, trails, flame tongues, electric filaments, or symbolic aura rings.
